feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: The credit card number is saved in encrypted format in the SAP B1 backend table.
entry.content:
In SAP Business One, credit card numbers are stored in encrypted form in backend tables. However, the last four digits are visible at the UI level.

Is there any standard way (query, SDK, or Service Layer) to retrieve at least the last four digits of the credit card number from SAP B1?

If direct access from the database is not possible, is there any supported API or object that provides the masked/last four digits?

entry.title: SAP B1 Crystal Connection Help
entry.content:
Hi,

Can someone provide assistance on how I can connect Crystal to SAP B1, its on a SQL server.

Thanks in advance...

Brian Branco

entry.title: Not able to upload data through DTW SAP B1
entry.content:
Hello Community,

When uploading COA or any other data, system is showing this. Please let me know how to get rid of this.

entry.title: Inventory Postings on Service Layer not work with Batches
entry.content:
I am using Service Layer to perform an inventory adjustment for some items.
The issue occurs when I try to adjust quantities for the same item but with different batches. In that case, I get the following error:

 

"code": -4014,
"message": "Cannot add row without complete selection of batch/serial numbers"

This is the request body I am sending to the Service Layer:

 

{
 
    "PostingDate": "2026-01-19T00:00:00Z",
    "CountDate": "2026-01-19T00:00:00Z",
    "CountTime": "23:47:00",
    "Remarks": "Basado en Recuento de inventario 2",
    "InventoryPostingLines": [
        {
            "LineNumber": 0,
            "ItemCode": "PAR-30000",
"WarehouseCode": "TJ-CENT",
            "InWarehouseQuantity": 50.0,
            "BarCode": "3333445",
            "InventoryOffsetIncreaseAccount": "8-1-04-002-0001",
            "InventoryOffsetDecreaseAccount": "8-1-04-002-0001",
            "UoMCode": "Manual",
            "InventoryPostingBatchNumbers": [
                {
                    "BatchNumber": "LOTE-20240927",
                    "ManufacturerSerialNumber": null,
                    "InternalSerialNumber": null,
                    "ExpiryDate": "2024-11-06T00:00:00Z",
                    "ManufactureDate": "2024-09-27T00:00:00Z",
                    "AddmisionDate": "2024-09-18T00:00:00Z",
                    "Location": null,
                    "Notes": null,
                    "Quantity": 2.0,
                    "BaseLineNumber": 0,
                    "TrackingNote": null,
                    "TrackingNoteLine": null,
                    "ItemCode": "PAR-30000",
                    "SystemSerialNumber": 10
                },
                {
                    "DocumentEntry": 1,
                    "BatchNumber": "LOTE-20240818",
                    "ManufacturerSerialNumber": null,
                    "InternalSerialNumber": null,
                    "ExpiryDate": "2024-12-17T00:00:00Z",
                    "ManufactureDate": "2024-08-18T00:00:00Z",
                    "AddmisionDate": "2024-09-18T00:00:00Z",
                    "Location": null,
                    "Notes": null,
                    "Quantity": 2.0,
                    "BaseLineNumber": 0,
                    "TrackingNote": null,
                    "TrackingNoteLine": null,
                    "ItemCode": "PAR-30000",
                    "SystemSerialNumber": 11
                }
            ]
        }
    ]
}

I have not been able to find a solution to this issue.
Could anyone help me understand what I am missing or what is wrong with this request?

entry.title: Issue with Endorsable On-Hand Checks in SAP Business One 10
entry.content:
Hi

We are currently facing an issue regarding the handling of on-hand checks.


We have uploaded on-hand checks using an Incoming Payment with the “On Account” option and marked the checks as endorsable. However, when attempting to record an Outgoing Payment to a vendor, the system does not allow the transaction to be completed using that endorsable check, which was originally received on account.

It is important to note that the same practice in SAP Business One version 9.3, where the system allowed this process without any errors.

entry.title: Customer Name range
entry.content:
Hi All

Please help how to edit selection critieria to be Range from and To Customer Name?  

Now is >=Customer Name but if I tried change to between or >= and <=, there is error and only showing one prompt.

/*SELECT * FROM "OCRD" T0*/

Declare CardName VARCHAR(254);

CardName := /* T0."CardName" */ '[%0]';

/*SELECT * FROM "@A_SUBDIV" T1*/

Declare FromSGrp VARCHAR(254);
Declare ToSGrp VARCHAR(254);

FromSGrp := /* T1."Code" */ '[%1]';
ToSGrp := /* T1."Code" */ '[%2]';

SELECT T0."DocNum", T0."DocDate", T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", T0."DocCur", T3."ItmsGrpNam",T5."Name" AS "Sub Product Group", T4."Name",
'$' || T1."ItemCode" AS "Item Code", T1."Dscription", T1."WhsCode", T1."Quantity" AS "PO Qty",
T1."OpenQty", T1."unitMsr" as "UOM", T1."PriceBefDi" AS "Unit Price", T1."DiscPrcnt" AS "%Disc", T1."TotalFrgn" AS "Total Order Value" , T0."U_ETA", T0."U_SHIPMODE",T0."U_REASON"
FROM OPOR T0 INNER JOIN POR1 T1 ON T0."DocEntry" = T1."DocEntry"
INNER JOIN OITM T2 ON T1."ItemCode" = T2."ItemCode"

INNER JOIN OITB T3 ON T2."ItmsGrpCod" = T3."ItmsGrpCod"
LEFT JOIN "@A_ITEMTYPE" T4 ON T2."U_ITEM_TYPES" = T4."Code"
LEFT OUTER JOIN "@A_SUBDIV" T5 ON T2."U_SUBDIV" = T5."Code"
WHERE T0."DocStatus" = 'O' AND T1."OpenQty" <> '0' AND
T0."CardName">=[%0]
AND
((UPPER(IFNULL(T5."Code",'ZNA')) >=UPPER(FromSGrp) OR FromSGrp='')and
(UPPER(IFNULL(T5."Code",'ZNA')) <= UPPER(ToSGrp) OR ToSGrp=''));

entry.title: On-prem infrastructure layout for SAP B1
entry.content:
Hi all,

I’m looking to compare notes with other SAP Business One admins/partners on how you’re structuring your infrastructure in production.

Current environment / direction:

  • SAP B1 10.x (mostly fat client via desktops + RDS)
  • SQL Server Standard edition
  • Considering dedicated physical SQL servers with Windows Failover Cluster (FCI) on shared iSCSI storage
  • SAP B1 components (SLD, License, Service Layer, Web Client, B1iF, Job Service, DI Server) on separate Windows VMs
  • nginx (or similar) in front for SLD / Service Layer
  • Add-ons: Boyum B1UP, Produmex

What I’m interested in hearing:

  • Are you running SQL physical or virtual?
  • If HA: FCI vs Always On AG (especially on SQL Standard)?
  • How are you handling Job Service / B1iF (active/standby vs active/active)?
  • Any “don’t do this” lessons learned?
  • Rough user counts and whether you’re mostly fat client or Web Client

Not looking for vendor pitches — just real-world setups that have been stable over time

entry.title: While updating Service Call Documents
entry.content:
Dear Team,

While updating Service Call Documents in SAP, we encountered the following error: “Cannot add or update document; rows are missing” (Item – Price – Item No.).
However, when we click the Update button twice, the document is successfully updated.

Kindly please suggest solution.

entry.title: .NET Version for SAP Business One 10.0 Add-ons
entry.content:
Greetings,

About the compatibility of C# .NET Framework Version on building Add-ons of SAP Business One 10.0 SP 2408.

I'm currently using C# .NET Framework 4.8 with SAPBobsCOM (UIAPI and DIAPI) and CrystalDecisions, and it's working very well, no any problem. But now, I'm planning to use Visual Studio 2022 or 2026 with newer .NET Framework Version. I've known that Version <= 4.8 is recommended but I have no idea if the newer version already works fine or not, or it's already outdated information about the recommended version.

So, I would like to ask, can I and should I use a newer version of .NET Framework? Is there any problem or incompatibility on this?

entry.title: Error While Filtering Goods Receipts by "DocTime"
entry.content:
Hello,

   I have a problem and I was wondering if anyone may have a suggestion.

Problem: I am trying to filter goods receipt forms that were created after a particular date and time. I'm using SAP's Service Layer REST API.

 Here is my GET request:

GET InventoryGenEntries?$filter=DocDate ge '2025-12-12T14:00:00Z' and DocTime ge '2025-12-12T14:00:00Z'

The expected response should be a nice json stream with a collection of Goods Receipt forms. Instead, I get the following json:

{
    "error" : {
        "code" : 299,
        "message" : {
            "lang" : "en-us",
            "value" : "Internal server error."
        }
    }
}

I already tried all the possible date and time formats documented in the SAP official Service Layer guide. Best case scenario I get a "Query string error - the given value('90000') of property 'DocTime' is of invalid time format", worst case scenario I get an "Internal server error."

And then, I found this KB: 2596415 - Error While Filtering Marketing Documents by "DocTime"

https://me.sap.com/notes/2596415/E

That KB is from 8 years ago, and a previous version of SAP. Plenty of patches have been published ever since.

Here is my environment: SAP Business One 10 sp 2505, SQL 2016 - fresh from three months ago.

Any help is greatly appreciated!

entry.title: SAP B1 - Bin Setup
entry.content:
Hi,
I am trying to get bins setup in a test company.

I setup a warehouse for bins, and added locations.  I added inventory to a couple of items and put them in the bins.

I put in a sales order and created a pick list, when the pick list was created, the bins were auto assigned.

It there a way that I can generate a pick list but not have the bins setup, when the order is picked, they want to pick the bin.  On the printout, they want to see all the bin locations for each item on the pick list.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: User can't reset password after manager set a temporary password
entry.content:
A handful of our users can't reset their password. I assign a temporary password to each and set "Change password at Next Logon". When they try to create their own new password, it says "Incorrect Password [Message 20701-3]" 

SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.181)

- Affected users were not locked.
- All other users can change their password.

entry.title: Getting Error While Changing Layout
entry.content:
We are facing an error while changing the layout for the A/R Invoice. The system displays the following message:

“This entry already exists in the following tables ‘Document Standards’ (RDFL) (ODBC 2035) (Message 131-183).”

Additionally, when attempting to take the SOF printout, the system prompts for database login credentials.

entry.title: Error while export electronic report - Failed to execute the electronic report
entry.content:
Dear Team,

While generating the GSTR2 and other electronic reports from SAP Business One, an error is occurring but the same is working fine on the server.

Report Path: Reports → Financial → Electronic Report

Bu

 

2026/02/05 12:51:03 [Information] Executing electronic report "GSTR2_Invoice"
2026/02/05 12:51:26 [Information] Saved the user input parameters successfully
2026/02/05 12:51:26 [Information] Creating output directory "\\sap2017\B1_SHR\Attachments\GSTR2_Invoice_260205_125126\"
2026/02/05 12:51:26 [Information] Exporting crystal report "GSTR2_INV_12" to XML
2026/02/05 12:51:28 [Error] Failed to export the crystal report
2026/02/05 12:51:28 [Error] Failed to execute the electronic report

Regards,

entry.title: Help With Transaction Notification
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have created two TN's on sales order which is working fine.

Working TN:


---- Prevent addition/ update of Sales Order if DocDueDate or ShipDate is Weekend or Holiday----

/* ROW LEVEL CHECK (ShipDate) */
IF EXISTS (
SELECT 1
FROM RDR1 T1
WHERE T1.DocEntry = @List_of_cols_val_tab_del
AND (
DATENAME(WEEKDAY, T1.ShipDate) IN ('Saturday','Sunday')
OR CAST(T1.ShipDate AS DATE) IN (SELECT CAST(StrDate AS DATE) FROM HLD1)
)
)
BEGIN
SET @error = 1717
SET @error_message = 'Sales Order line Ship Date cannot fall on a Weekend or Holiday.'
GOTO TN_RESULT
END


/* HEADER LEVEL CHECK (DocDueDate) */
IF EXISTS (
SELECT 1
FROM ORDR T0
WHERE T0.DocEntry = @List_of_cols_val_tab_del
AND (
DATENAME(WEEKDAY, T0.DocDueDate) IN ('Saturday','Sunday')
OR CAST(T0.DocDueDate AS DATE) IN (SELECT CAST(StrDate AS DATE) FROM HLD1)
)

)
BEGIN
SET @error = 1718
SET @error_message = 'Sales Order Due Date cannot fall on a Weekend or Holiday.'
GOTO TN_RESULT
END

This is working fine.

However, When I consolidate these into a single TN, it doesn't work.

Is this system behavior or something missing in the code:

----------------------------

Consolidated TN not working

--------------------------------

IF EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM ORDR T0
    INNER JOIN RDR1 T1 ON T0.DocEntry = T1.DocEntry
    WHERE T0.DocEntry = @List_of_cols_val_tab_del
      AND (
            -- Weekend/Holiday check for SO Due Date
            DATENAME(weekday, T0.DocDueDate) IN ('Saturday', 'Sunday')
            OR T0.DocDueDate IN (SELECT H.StrDate FROM HLD1 H)

            -- Weekend/Holiday check for Row ShipDate
            OR DATENAME(weekday, T1.ShipDate) IN ('Saturday', 'Sunday')
            OR T1.ShipDate IN (SELECT H.StrDate FROM HLD1 H)
          )
      AND T0.DocDueDate >= CAST(GETDATE() AS date)
)
BEGIN
    DECLARE @daytype NVARCHAR(100)

    SELECT TOP 1
        @daytype = CASE
                       WHEN DATENAME(weekday, T0.DocDueDate) IN ('Saturday','Sunday')
                            THEN 'Weekend (Header DocDueDate)'
                       WHEN DATENAME(weekday, T1.ShipDate) IN ('Saturday','Sunday')
                            THEN 'Weekend (Row ShipDate)'
                       WHEN T0.DocDueDate IN (SELECT StrDate FROM HLD1)
                            THEN 'Holiday (Header DocDueDate)'
                       WHEN T1.ShipDate IN (SELECT StrDate FROM HLD1)
                            THEN 'Holiday (Row ShipDate)'
                   END
    FROM ORDR T0
    INNER JOIN RDR1 T1 ON T0.DocEntry = T1.DocEntry
    WHERE T0.DocEntry = @List_of_cols_val_tab_del
      AND (
            DATENAME(weekday, T0.DocDueDate) IN ('Saturday', 'Sunday')
            OR DATENAME(weekday, T1.ShipDate) IN ('Saturday', 'Sunday')
            OR T0.DocDueDate IN (SELECT StrDate FROM HLD1)
            OR T1.ShipDate IN (SELECT StrDate FROM HLD1)
          )

    SET @error = 1717
    SET @error_message = 'Date cannot be on a ' + @daytype + '!'
    GOTO TN_RESULT
END

 

Can someone please check and let me know what is missing for the consolidated TN to make it work?

Regards,

Joseph

entry.title: Help With Transaction Notification
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have created two TN's on sales order which is working fine.

Working TN:


---- Prevent addition/ update of Sales Order if DocDueDate or ShipDate is Weekend or Holiday----

/* ROW LEVEL CHECK (ShipDate) */
IF EXISTS (
SELECT 1
FROM RDR1 T1
WHERE T1.DocEntry = @List_of_cols_val_tab_del
AND (
DATENAME(WEEKDAY, T1.ShipDate) IN ('Saturday','Sunday')
OR CAST(T1.ShipDate AS DATE) IN (SELECT CAST(StrDate AS DATE) FROM HLD1)
)
)
BEGIN
SET @error = 1717
SET @error_message = 'Sales Order line Ship Date cannot fall on a Weekend or Holiday.'
GOTO TN_RESULT
END


/* HEADER LEVEL CHECK (DocDueDate) */
IF EXISTS (
SELECT 1
FROM ORDR T0
WHERE T0.DocEntry = @List_of_cols_val_tab_del
AND (
DATENAME(WEEKDAY, T0.DocDueDate) IN ('Saturday','Sunday')
OR CAST(T0.DocDueDate AS DATE) IN (SELECT CAST(StrDate AS DATE) FROM HLD1)
)

)
BEGIN
SET @error = 1718
SET @error_message = 'Sales Order Due Date cannot fall on a Weekend or Holiday.'
GOTO TN_RESULT
END

This is working fine.

However, When I consolidate these into a single TN, it doesn't work.

Is this system behavior or something missing in the code:

----------------------------

Consolidated TN not working

--------------------------------

IF EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM ORDR T0
    INNER JOIN RDR1 T1 ON T0.DocEntry = T1.DocEntry
    WHERE T0.DocEntry = @List_of_cols_val_tab_del
      AND (
            -- Weekend/Holiday check for SO Due Date
            DATENAME(weekday, T0.DocDueDate) IN ('Saturday', 'Sunday')
            OR T0.DocDueDate IN (SELECT H.StrDate FROM HLD1 H)

            -- Weekend/Holiday check for Row ShipDate
            OR DATENAME(weekday, T1.ShipDate) IN ('Saturday', 'Sunday')
            OR T1.ShipDate IN (SELECT H.StrDate FROM HLD1 H)
          )
      AND T0.DocDueDate >= CAST(GETDATE() AS date)
)
BEGIN
    DECLARE @daytype NVARCHAR(100)

    SELECT TOP 1
        @daytype = CASE
                       WHEN DATENAME(weekday, T0.DocDueDate) IN ('Saturday','Sunday')
                            THEN 'Weekend (Header DocDueDate)'
                       WHEN DATENAME(weekday, T1.ShipDate) IN ('Saturday','Sunday')
                            THEN 'Weekend (Row ShipDate)'
                       WHEN T0.DocDueDate IN (SELECT StrDate FROM HLD1)
                            THEN 'Holiday (Header DocDueDate)'
                       WHEN T1.ShipDate IN (SELECT StrDate FROM HLD1)
                            THEN 'Holiday (Row ShipDate)'
                   END
    FROM ORDR T0
    INNER JOIN RDR1 T1 ON T0.DocEntry = T1.DocEntry
    WHERE T0.DocEntry = @List_of_cols_val_tab_del
      AND (
            DATENAME(weekday, T0.DocDueDate) IN ('Saturday', 'Sunday')
            OR DATENAME(weekday, T1.ShipDate) IN ('Saturday', 'Sunday')
            OR T0.DocDueDate IN (SELECT StrDate FROM HLD1)
            OR T1.ShipDate IN (SELECT StrDate FROM HLD1)
          )

    SET @error = 1717
    SET @error_message = 'Date cannot be on a ' + @daytype + '!'
    GOTO TN_RESULT
END

 

Can someone please check and let me know what is missing for the consolidated TN to make it work?

Question posted in Q&Z: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/help-with-transaction-notification/qaq-p/14324378

Regards,

Joseph

entry.title: Triggers no SAP B1
entry.content:
Bom dia, pessoal, tudo bem?

Possuo uma arquitetura de ingestão de dados em tempo quase real do SAP Business One (rodando em SAP HANA) para um Data Mesh no Google BigQuery, utilizando Apache Kafka como camada de streaming.

Uso como critério, os campos de UpdateDate = CURRENTDATE.

Porém, quando falamos na JDT1 (faço uma query linkando OJDT e JDT1 para pegar o UpdateDate) , temos rotinas internas que atualizam campos como BalDueDeb e BalDueCred, ou seja, essas alterações via rotinas SAP não me geram uma alteração no UpdateDate, e por consequência meu BigQuery fica com dados desatualizados/incorretos para aquele TransID.

Gostaria de saber se criar uma trigger para pegar todos meus Updates realizados na JDT1 e enviar para uma tabela de auditoria:

  • Seria aceito pelo SAP? O que o SAP diz a respeito de criação de triggers? 
  • Eu poderia ter problemas futuros?
  • Eu geraria muito impacto em meu banco de dados? Em performance no sistema, consumo de recursos.. (a trigger seria executada a cada update e/ou insert)
  • Quais outras saídas posso ter? 
  • Se eu criar uma view no meu Hana para "simular" essas alterações de BalDueDeb e BalDueCred através das baixas realizadas, resolveria meu problema?

Atenciosamente,

entry.title: current date and time in Financial Report
entry.content:
Hi All

Is it possible to show current Date and time in Financial Report such as Trial Balance printing?

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Looking for a course SAP 4 Hotel
entry.content:
Hi 

I am looking for a course in SAP 4 Hotel. I could not find any details in SAP website, but I can see some information in google.

Could you please help me to provide more information about SAP 4 Hotel course

entry.title: SAP Business One Freezes When Logging On
entry.content:
After upgrading SAP Business One from version 10 FP 2008 to 10 FP 2505 Hotfix 1, users are able to log in to the company database successfully. However, immediately after login, the mouse cursor keeps loading (moving) for approximately 1–2 minutes before the system becomes responsive.

This delay occurs consistently and significantly impacts usability and productivity.

Analysis Performed:

  1. I created a separate demo company database where no SAP add-ons are installed.
  2. Login to the demo database is completed instantly, without any delay.
  3. Based on this comparison, the issue appears to be related to the SAP add-on EFM – Format Definition.
  4. When the EFM add-on is present, the post-login delay occurs; when it is not installed, the login is normal.

Kindly advise on how to resolve or optimize this issue. Please let us know if, any configuration or known issue exists that could cause this post-login delay.
